scripts.build: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://sure-write.localhost -o dist/sure-write.wasm
scripts.build:debug: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -d -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://sure-write.localhost -o dist/sure-write.wasm
scripts.k6:test: k6 run -e PROFILE=${PROFILE:-default} -e HOLD=${HOLD:-1m} -e INGEST_TOKEN=$INGEST_TOKEN k6/ingest-stress.js
scripts.k6:test-clean: k6 run -e PROFILE=${PROFILE:-default} -e HOLD=${HOLD:-1m} -e INGEST_TOKEN=$INGEST_TOKEN k6/ingest-stress.js && bash k6/cleanup-buckets.sh
